text.title: Solo X Analytics Review Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid report artefact.

example.title: Happy-path report artefact
example.description: Indie operators using X as the primary audience channel where 'engagement isn't compounding' because there's no weekly diagnostic rhythm and the wrong metrics get tracked. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated report matching the output contract.
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-five-metrics-fixed drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
